name: flowdesk-raycast
title: FlowDesk
description: Dictation, snippets, AI commands, and transcript workflows inside Raycast.
author: dix105

commands.name: index
commands.title: Command Center
commands.description: Search FlowDesk commands for dictation, snippets, AI workflows, and transcripts.

commands.name: create-snippet
commands.title: Create Snippet
commands.description: Create a reusable snippet with an optional keyword and tags.

commands.name: create-ai-command
commands.title: Create AI Command
commands.description: Save a reusable AI prompt command.

commands.name: run-ai-command
commands.title: Run AI Command
commands.description: Run saved AI commands against selected text or clipboard content.

commands.name: transcript-memory
commands.title: Transcript Memory
commands.description: Search and reuse saved dictation transcripts.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Used by AI commands. Leave empty to use mock output while testing.
